emails.body:
Hi James,

Based on your recent activity, we think you might be interested in these AI governance courses:

• AI Ethics and Governance (University of Helsinki) – 6 weeks
• Responsible AI: Principles and Practices (DeepLearning.AI) – 4 weeks
• Governing AI Systems (London School of Economics) – 8 weeks

Each course includes video lectures, peer-reviewed assignments, and a shareable certificate upon completion.

Explore recommendations →

Happy learning,
The Coursera Team

Hi James,

You saved "Machine Learning Foundations" (Stanford Online) but haven't started Module 3 yet. Pick up where you left off — your progress is waiting.

Continue Module 3: Supervised Learning Algorithms

This module covers:
• Linear and logistic regression
• Decision trees and ensemble methods
• Model evaluation and cross-validation

Estimated time: 4–6 hours

Keep going,
The Coursera Team
